narrative:
Andover Twp township has 1,736 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.2 percentage points.
